zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Berkeley於1355年4月1日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley25歲，母親Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley28歲。他於1394年之前與Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1405年6月13日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾武斯可享年50歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Berkeley于1355年4月1日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley25岁，母亲Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley28岁。他于1394年之前与Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1405年6月13日在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾武斯可享年50岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Berkeley was born on 1 April 1355, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, was 28. He married Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan before 1394, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 June 1405, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales: Usk, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Berkeley est né le 1 avril 1355, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan avant 1394, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1405, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Berkeley am 1. April 1355 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley 28. Er hat vor 1394 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Juni 1405 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

ht.Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales: Usk, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Berkeley è nato il il 1 aprile 1355 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan prima del 1394, nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 giugno 1405, nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Berkeleyが1355年4月1日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeleyは25歳，母Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeleyは28歳であった。1394年以前にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランでElizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1405年6月13日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクで50歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Berkeley(이)가 1355년 4월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1394년 이전 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1405년 6월 13일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.1 April 1355–13 June 1405: 1 de abril de 1355–13 de junho de 1405
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Berkeley nasceu em 1 de abril de 1355, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan antes 1394, em Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1405, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales: Usk, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Berkeley родился 1 апреля 1355 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan перед 1394 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 июня 1405 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.1 April 1355–13 June 1405: 1 de abril de 1355–13 de junio de 1405
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Berkeley nació el 1 de abril de 1355, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan antes de 1394, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de junio de 1405, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
